release_notes: v1.4.0+15: Added Google Play Core In-App Updates, Play In-App Review integration with automated triggers, and enhanced Rate App experience.
features: Integrated Google Play Core In-App Updates with flexible and immediate update flows.
Added native Play In-App Review integration with sophisticated automated triggers.
Implemented community-focused Rate App card with Thanks state feedback.
Added Rate App option to AppDrawer for easy manual access.
fixes: Fixed local version detection for GitHub builds.
Prevented double-trigger of app entry review prompt.
Added missing import for sharedPreferencesProvider in review service.
